docs.title: 品牌模块图片配置说明
概述
docs.text:
已为您的文档网站添加了完整的品牌模块展示功能。品牌模块包括：

  1. 主页品牌展示 - 在首页展示3个产品线
  2. 产品页面 - 详细的品牌和产品分类
  3. 手册页面 - 产品分类和搜索指南

docs.title: 📂 所需图片文件
docs.text: 请在 docs/assets/images/ 目录下添加以下图片文件：

docs.title: 必需图片
docs.text:
docs/assets/images/
├── brand-premium.png      # Premium Series 品牌标志（推荐 200x200px）
├── brand-standard.png     # Standard Series 品牌标志（推荐 200x200px）
└── brand-value.png        # Value Series 品牌标志（推荐 200x200px）

docs.title: 图片建议规格
docs.text:
• 格式: PNG、JPG 或 WebP
  • 尺寸: 200x200px 至 400x400px
  • 大小: 每个文件建议不超过 100KB
  • 背景: 支持透明背景 (PNG)

docs.title: 1. 主页品牌展示
docs.text: 文件: docs/index.md 位置: Hero 部分下方 展示方式: 3列表格，包含图片和链接

docs.title: 2. 产品页面品牌模块
docs.text: 文件: docs/Products/index.md 位置: 页面顶部 展示方式: - Markdown 网格卡片（带链接和描述） - 每个品牌线包含功能列表

docs.title: 3. 手册页面
docs.text: 文件: docs/manuals/index.md 位置: 页面内容 展示方式: 分类卡片网格

docs.title: 修改图片路径
docs.text:
在 Markdown 中，通过以下方式引用图片：

![Premium Brand](../assets/images/brand-premium.png){ width="200" }

docs.title: 添加更多品牌线
docs.text:
在 docs/Products/index.md 中添加新的品牌部分：

-   <div class="goldse-card" markdown>
    ![Custom Brand](../assets/images/brand-custom.png){ width="200" }

    ### Custom Series
    Your product description here.

    [Learn More →](link)
    </div>

docs.title: 自定义样式
docs.text:
所有品牌模块的样式定义在： 

docs/stylesheets/custom.css

关键类名： - .brands-showcase - 主页品牌展示 - .brands-grid - 产品页品牌网格 - .goldse-card - 品牌卡片

docs.title: 📱 响应式设计
docs.text: 品牌模块已优化为响应式设计： - 桌面端: 3列布局 - 平板端: 2列布局 - 手机端: 1列布局

docs.title: 🚀 构建和预览
docs.text:
构建网站以查看品牌模块效果：

# 进入项目目录
cd c:\Users\Administrator\goldsea-manual\goldsea-manual

# 安装依赖（如需）
pip install -r requirements.txt

# 构建站点
mkdocs build

# 本地预览
mkdocs serve

访问 http://localhost:8000 查看结果。

docs.title: 📝 文件清单
docs.text:
已创建/更新的文件：

  • ✅ docs/index.md - 添加品牌展示模块
  • ✅ docs/Products/index.md - 新建产品页面
  • ✅ docs/manuals/index.md - 新建手册页面
  • ✅ docs/stylesheets/custom.css - 新增品牌样式

docs.title: 💡 最佳实践
docs.text:
1. 图片优化: 在上传前用图片编辑工具压缩图片
  2. 命名规范: 使用小写字母和连字符命名图片
  3. 替代文本: 始终为图片提供有意义的 alt 文本
  4. 一致性: 保持所有品牌图片的风格和尺寸一致
  5. 更新: 定期更新产品表格中的版本号和日期

docs.title: 图片不显示
docs.text:
• 检查文件名是否与 Markdown 中的引用完全匹配（区分大小写）
  • 确保图片文件在正确的目录: docs/assets/images/
  • 验证图片格式是否被支持

docs.title: 样式未应用
docs.text:
• 清除浏览器缓存
  • 重新构建网站: mkdocs build
  • 检查 CSS 文件是否被正确加载

更新时间: 2026-04-30 配置版本: 1.0

docs.title: About Goldse
docs.text: Goldse provides clear product information, practical documentation, and support resources for professional tools and equipment.

docs.title: Our Focus
docs.text: We help customers understand products quickly through organized manuals, concise product pages, and accessible support channels.

docs.title: What We Provide
docs.text:
• Product Information

    Clear product categories, feature summaries, and usage guidance.

  • Documentation

    Manuals, installation guides, maintenance notes, and troubleshooting resources.

  • Support Access

    A simple way for customers to reach the team for questions and service needs.

docs.title: Brand Values
docs.text:
• Clear and practical guidance
  • Reliable product information
  • Consistent support experience
  • Easy access across desktop and mobile devices

docs.title: Contact Us
docs.text: Have a product question, documentation request, or support need? Contact the Goldse team and we will help you find the right information.

docs.title: Support Topics
docs.text:
• Product Questions

    Ask about product features, specifications, or compatibility.

  • Manual Requests

    Request installation guides, user manuals, or technical documents.

  • Service Support

    Get help with troubleshooting, maintenance, and warranty-related questions.

docs.title: Contact Information
docs.text:
Please prepare your product model, purchase channel, and a brief description of your question before contacting support.

Email: support@goldseatool.com

docs.text:
GGoldseProductsAmazon Tool CollectionGoldsea 4.2V Mini Electric ScrewdriverASIN B09YRDY3YSGoldsea 6 Inch Mini ChainsawASIN B0BBLMBYP8Goldsea Adjustable Electric ScrewdriverASIN B0BBVG9ZLNGoldsea Mini Chainsaw KitASIN B0C48Z1HBRGoldsea White ScrewdriverASIN B0CFFK4V9KGoldsea AI Translation EarbudsASIN B0GC6CHLQTShop allProduct comparisonManualsUser ManualsSetup GuidesTroubleshootingAboutSupportView Products LanguageEnglish日本語DeutschItaliano Product Gallery

Home / Cordless Screwdrivers / B09YRDY3YS

Goldsea 4.2V Mini Electric Screwdriver, 3.5 N.m Forward/Reverse, Transformable Handle, 1500 mAh Type-C Charging, 60 Minutes Runtime, 10 Bits, LED Light, Cordless Lightweight DIY Tool¥2,716

ASIN: B09YRDY3YS

View on AmazonBack to catalog Goldsea 4.2V Mini Electric Screwdriver

A compact 4.2V cordless electric screwdriver for furniture assembly, home appliance maintenance and DIY repair. It supports manual/electric operation, a 90°/180° transformable handle, Type-C charging, LED lighting and 10 CRV bits.

About this item
  • Manual and electric 2-in-1 screwdriver: choose powered driving or manual tightening according to the task. Maximum electric torque is 3.5 N.m and manual torque is 10 N.m.
  • Type-C rechargeable 1500 mAh battery: compared with common 1000 mAh models, the larger battery supports about 60 minutes of continuous use and 60-70 minutes of runtime.
  • 10-piece CRV bit set: magnetic chuck holds the bit securely and allows quick replacement for assembly, disassembly, furniture repair and home appliance maintenance.
  • Compact and durable body: the mini screwdriver weighs about 400 g and uses an anti-slip rubber grip for easier handling during long DIY work.
  • Transformable 90°/180° handle: press PUSH and rotate the handle to switch from pistol shape to straight shape; the extension rod helps reach blind corners and narrow spaces.
  • Forward/reverse rotation and LED light: switch rotation direction for tightening or loosening screws, and use the built-in LED light in dark work areas.
Product Features
  • Manual and electric 2-in-1 use lets you switch between powered fastening and hand control.
  • 3.5 N.m electric torque and 10 N.m manual torque cover daily tightening and loosening jobs.
  • 1500 mAh Type-C rechargeable battery provides about 60 minutes of continuous use.
  • 10 CRV screwdriver bits and magnetic chuck support quick bit changes for different screws.
  • 400 g lightweight body, anti-slip rubber grip and transformable handle make tight-space work easier.
  • Forward/reverse switch supports both tightening and removing screws.
SpecificationsVoltage4.2VBattery1500 mAhRuntime60-70 minutesSpeed230-280 rpmTorque3.5 N.m electric / 10 N.m manualBits10 CRV bitsChargingType-CLightLED work light Selling Point Analysis
  • 2-in-1 electric/manual operation gives buyers both speed and control.
  • Type-C charging and a 1500 mAh battery are easy to understand and marketable daily-use benefits.
  • The 90°/180° transformable handle solves the common pain point of working in narrow spaces.
  • The included 10-bit set increases perceived value and reduces the need for extra accessories.
  • LED lighting, lightweight body and rubber grip make the product friendly for beginners and home DIY users.
Q&ACan it work as both an electric and manual screwdriver?

Yes. It supports electric driving for speed and manual tightening when more control is needed.

How long can the battery be used?

The 1500 mAh battery supports about 60 minutes of continuous use, with typical runtime around 60-70 minutes.

What charging method does it use?

It uses Type-C charging, so it can be recharged with common USB power sources.

What accessories are included?

The kit includes a 10-piece CRV screwdriver bit set, and selected versions also include an extension rod and charging cable.

Can it be used in tight spaces?

Yes. The 90°/180° transformable handle and extension rod help reach corners, cabinets and narrow work areas.

Does it help in dark areas?

Yes. The LED work light turns on during operation to make dark screws easier to see.

A+ Detail Images

6 Inch Mini Chainsaw with Battery 4000 mAh, Goldsea Battery Chainsaw with Automatic Oiler and Brushless Motor Electric Saw Lopper for Garden Tree Cutting and Firewood (YP8)-14% €50.00RRP: €59.00

ASIN: B0BBLMBYP8

View on AmazonBack to catalog Goldsea 6 Inch Mini Chainsaw with 4000 mAh Battery

A 6 inch battery mini chainsaw with an 800W brushless motor, automatic oiler, two 2000 mAh batteries, safety lock and chain guard for garden pruning, wood cutting and camping tasks.

About this item
  • 6 inch battery mini chainsaw for garden pruning, branch trimming, small wood cutting and camping use.
  • 800W brushless motor and high chain speed help cut branches efficiently and smoothly.
  • Two 2000 mAh batteries support alternating use and reduce waiting time during outdoor work.
  • Automatic chain lubrication keeps the chain moving smoothly and reduces maintenance effort.
  • Double safety lock and chain guard help reduce accidental starts and improve operating safety.
  • The kit includes chainsaw, batteries, charger, spare chains and maintenance accessories for immediate use.
Product Features
  • 800W brushless motor and chain speed up to 7 m/s cut branches efficiently.
  • Two 2000 mAh batteries provide 50-60 minutes of continuous cutting.
  • Automatic chain lubrication keeps the chain smooth and reduces manual maintenance.
  • Double safety lock and chain guard improve stability and help avoid accidental starts.
  • Quiet operation is suitable for home gardens without disturbing family or neighbors.
  • Package includes chainsaw, batteries, charger, spare chains, file, gloves, glasses, brush and manual.
SpecificationsPower sourceBattery poweredMotor800W brushlessBattery2 × 2000 mAhCutting bar6 inchDimensions39 × 20 × 15 cmWeight1.84 kgUPC717981722808 Selling Point Analysis
  • The 6 inch compact size targets garden pruning and small wood cutting rather than heavy logging.
  • Brushless motor, battery power and automatic lubrication are strong technical selling points.
  • Tool-free chain tension directly addresses a common user pain point with small chainsaws.
  • Two-battery kits and visible battery level improve confidence for longer outdoor tasks.
  • Safety lock, chain guard and quieter operation make the product easier to position for home users.
Q&AWhat cutting jobs is it suitable for?

It is suitable for garden pruning, branch cutting, small wood cutting, camping and daily yard maintenance.

Does it have automatic lubrication?

Yes. The chain is automatically supplied with oil during use to help protect the blade and chain.

Can the chain be adjusted without tools?

Yes. Chain replacement and chain tension adjustment can be completed without special tools on the compatible models.

How many batteries are included?

The battery kit versions include two 2.0 Ah batteries that can be used alternately.

How powerful is the motor?

The mini chainsaw uses an 800W brushless motor designed for smooth cutting with lower noise.

How many cuts can a full charge make?

A full charge can make up to about 35 cuts, depending on wood size, hardness and operating conditions.

A+ Detail Images

Replacement guide plate and saw chain for Goldsea 6 inch chainsaws, designed for maintenance, chain replacement and restoring cutting performance.

About this item
  • Replacement guide plate and saw chain set for compatible Goldsea 6 inch chainsaws.
  • 36-link 1/4 pitch chain format is designed for compact mini chainsaw systems.
  • Useful for restoring cutting performance when the original chain becomes worn or dull.
  • Lightweight spare part can be stored with the chainsaw kit for maintenance needs.
  • Suitable for garden, DIY and cordless chainsaw users who need replacement accessories.
Product Features
  • Replacement guide plate and saw chain for Goldsea 6 inch chainsaw models.
  • 36-link 1/4 pitch chain format supports compact chainsaw cutting systems.
  • Useful as a spare accessory for garden, DIY and maintenance users.
  • Lightweight part is easy to store with the chainsaw kit.

Q&AWhat is this replacement set used for?

It is used to replace the guide plate and saw chain on compatible Goldsea 6 inch chainsaws.

When should the chain be replaced?

Replace it when the chain becomes dull, stretched, damaged or no longer cuts smoothly.

Is this a complete chainsaw?

No. This is a replacement guide plate and saw chain set, not a full chainsaw kit.

What chain format does it use?

The listing information indicates a 36-link chain with 1/4 pitch.

Is it easy to store?

Yes. The replacement set is compact and lightweight enough to keep with the chainsaw accessories.

Who is it suitable for?

It is suitable for Goldsea mini chainsaw owners who want spare parts for maintenance and repair.

Goldsea Mini Chainsaw with Battery 6 Inch Battery Chainsaw with Battery and Charger Brushless Motor, Automatic Chain Lubrication and Tool-free Chain Tension, Portable Battery Hand Chainsaw€99.92

ASIN: B0C48Z1HBR

View on AmazonBack to catalog Goldsea 6 Inch Mini Chainsaw with Battery and Charger

A portable 6 inch battery hand chainsaw with brushless motor, automatic chain lubrication, tool-free chain tension and two batteries for garden cutting and pruning.

About this item
  • Two 2.0 Ah batteries and EU fast charger: charging time is about 90 minutes, and the two batteries can be used alternately for longer cutting sessions.
  • Battery level display: the saw shows the current battery level so users know when the battery needs to be recharged.
  • Up to 35 cuts per full charge: a full battery charge supports continuous garden cutting work without frequent interruption.
  • Tool-free chain change and chain tension: both chain replacement and chain tension adjustment can be completed without special tools.
  • Automatic chain lubrication: oil is supplied to the chain automatically during use, helping extend the life of the blade and chain.
  • 800W brushless motor and sharp heat-hardened chain: designed for lower noise, smooth cutting and easier branch pruning.
Product Features
  • Two 2.0 Ah Li-ion batteries and fast charger allow alternating use.
  • Battery level display shows when the saw needs charging.
  • Tool-free chain change and tension adjustment simplify maintenance.
  • Automatic chain lubrication protects the blade and chain during use.
  • 800W brushless motor and heat-hardened chain cut smoothly with low noise.
  • A full battery charge allows up to 35 cuts depending on material and use.
SpecificationsPower sourceBattery systemMotor800W brushlessWeight2.88 kgDimensions21 × 15 × 44 cmUPC717981725029IncludedChainsawASINB0C48Z1HBR Selling Point Analysis
  • The 6 inch compact size targets garden pruning and small wood cutting rather than heavy logging.
  • Brushless motor, battery power and automatic lubrication are strong technical selling points.
  • Tool-free chain tension directly addresses a common user pain point with small chainsaws.
  • Two-battery kits and visible battery level improve confidence for longer outdoor tasks.
  • Safety lock, chain guard and quieter operation make the product easier to position for home users.
Q&AWhat cutting jobs is it suitable for?

It is suitable for garden pruning, branch cutting, small wood cutting, camping and daily yard maintenance.

Does it have automatic lubrication?

Yes. The chain is automatically supplied with oil during use to help protect the blade and chain.

Can the chain be adjusted without tools?

Yes. Chain replacement and chain tension adjustment can be completed without special tools on the compatible models.

How many batteries are included?

The battery kit versions include two 2.0 Ah batteries that can be used alternately.

How powerful is the motor?

The mini chainsaw uses an 800W brushless motor designed for smooth cutting with lower noise.

How many cuts can a full charge make?

A full charge can make up to about 35 cuts, depending on wood size, hardness and operating conditions.

Goldsea White 4.2V Mini Electric Screwdriver with 3.5 N.m Torque, 1500 mAh Type-C Charging, LED Light, 10 Bits and Transformable HandlePrice shown on Amazon

ASIN: B0CFFK4V9K

View on AmazonBack to catalog Goldsea White 4.2V Mini Electric Screwdriver

White compact 4.2V mini electric screwdriver with 3.5 N.m torque, 1500 mAh Type-C charging, LED light, 10 bits and transformable handle for DIY furniture assembly.

About this item
  • White 4.2V mini electric screwdriver for furniture assembly, home appliance repair and DIY work.
  • Manual/electric 2-in-1 use gives both powered speed and manual control.
  • 1500 mAh Type-C rechargeable battery provides convenient repeated charging.
  • 10 screwdriver bits and magnetic chuck help complete common home repair tasks.
  • Compact 400 g body and rubber grip make the tool practical and easy to hold.
  • Transformable handle, forward/reverse switch and LED light improve usability in narrow or dark areas.
Product Features
  • Manual/electric 2-in-1 design adapts to daily repair work.
  • 3.5 N.m torque and 1500 mAh battery improve work efficiency.
  • Type-C charging removes the need for disposable battery replacement.
  • 10 screwdriver bits and magnetic chuck support common home tasks.
  • 400 g compact body with rubber grip is practical and easy to hold.
  • Transformable handle switches from pistol to straight form for narrow areas.
  • Forward/reverse switch changes bit direction for tightening and loosening.
SpecificationsPower sourceBattery poweredVoltage4.2V DCTorque4 N.m classBrandGoldseaIncludedDrill attachment, electric screwdriver bodyDimensions15 × 5.1 × 15 cmASINB0CFFK4V9K Selling Point Analysis
  • 2-in-1 electric/manual operation gives buyers both speed and control.
  • Type-C charging and a 1500 mAh battery are easy to understand and marketable daily-use benefits.
  • The 90°/180° transformable handle solves the common pain point of working in narrow spaces.
  • The included 10-bit set increases perceived value and reduces the need for extra accessories.
  • LED lighting, lightweight body and rubber grip make the product friendly for beginners and home DIY users.
Q&ACan it work as both an electric and manual screwdriver?

Yes. It supports electric driving for speed and manual tightening when more control is needed.

How long can the battery be used?

The 1500 mAh battery supports about 60 minutes of continuous use, with typical runtime around 60-70 minutes.

What charging method does it use?

It uses Type-C charging, so it can be recharged with common USB power sources.

What accessories are included?

The kit includes a 10-piece CRV screwdriver bit set, and selected versions also include an extension rod and charging cable.

Can it be used in tight spaces?

Yes. The 90°/180° transformable handle and extension rod help reach corners, cabinets and narrow work areas.

Does it help in dark areas?

Yes. The LED work light turns on during operation to make dark screws easier to see.

Wireless Bluetooth AI translation earbuds supporting real-time two-way translation in 156 languages, 50-hour playtime with charging case and app-based translation for travel, business and learning.

About this item
  • Real-time two-way AI translation supports 156 languages for travel, business and learning.
  • Five translation modes support free talk, headphone plus phone, audio/video calls, photo translation and translation machine mode.
  • Charging case provides up to 50 hours of total use, with long single-use listening time.
  • High-fidelity sound and intelligent noise reduction support translation, calls and music.
  • Lightweight earbuds with silicone ear hooks are designed for comfortable long-term wear.
  • IPX5 waterproof design improves reliability for outdoor travel and daily commuting.
Product Features
  • Real-time two-way translation supports 156 languages.
  • AI translation helps reduce language barriers during travel, exhibitions and meetings.
  • High-fidelity sound and intelligent noise reduction support calls, music and translation.
  • Charging case extends total battery life up to 50 hours.
  • Audio/video call translation supports international collaboration.
  • Lightweight 7.8 g earbuds, silicone ear hooks and IPX5 waterproof design improve comfort.
  • Five modes cover free talk, headphone+phone, calls, photo translation and translation machine mode.
SpecificationsLanguages156PlaytimeUp to 50 hours with caseDimensions6.1 × 3.35 × 1.57 inWeight4.2 ozBattery1 AAA includedManufacturerGoldSeaASINB0GC6CHLQT Selling Point Analysis
  • 156-language translation is the headline feature and easy for shoppers to understand.
  • 50-hour case battery life supports travel, exhibitions and business trips.
  • Audio/video call translation expands use beyond face-to-face travel scenarios.
  • Noise reduction and music/call support make the product useful even when translation is not needed.
  • Five translation modes create a stronger feature story than basic translator earbuds.
Q&AHow many languages are supported?

The translation earbuds support real-time two-way translation in 156 languages.

What translation modes are available?

They support free talk, headphone plus phone, audio/video call translation, photo translation and translation machine mode.

How long is the battery life?

The charging case provides up to 50 hours of total use.

Can they be used for calls and music?

Yes. They support translation, calls and music with high-fidelity audio and noise reduction.

Are they suitable for travel?

Yes. They are designed for travel, business communication, exhibitions, learning and cross-language conversations.

Are they comfortable to wear?

The earbuds are lightweight, use silicone ear hooks and include IPX5 waterproof protection for daily use.
